localized_texts.text: Phuket Fantasea

Inspired by Thailand’s exotic heritage, Phuket FantaSea not only showcases the charm and beauty of Thailand, but also enriches ancient Thai traditions with the wonder of cutting-edge technology and special effects. The result is a stunning 30-acre cultural theme park that has become the ultimate in night-time entertainment on the resort island of Phuket. Created at a cost of over 3,500 million Baht (US$100 million), Phuket FantaSea offers a multitude of attractions not found anywhere else in the world.
Offers a unique entertainment experience that immerses guests in the rich heritage of Thailand.
Spectacular performances to cutting-edge special effects, Phuket FantaSea stands as the ultimate nighttime destination on the island.
Unforgettable journey into the heart of Thai culture and folklore.

Cultural Extravaganza: The highlight is the "Fantasy of a Kingdom" show, featuring Thai cultural performances, acrobatics, illusions, special effects, and elephants (be aware of some controversy surrounding animal shows).Theme Park Ambiance: Explore the park grounds with various entertainment options like carnival games, a shopping village featuring Thai handicrafts, and a simulated Thai palace.Golden Kinnaree Buffet Restaurant: Enjoy a pre-show buffet with a variety of Thai and international dishes (separate ticket required).
Dress Code: There's no strict dress code, but smart casual attire is recommended.
Dress Code:  Comfortable clothing and shoes are ideal as you'll be walking around the park.
Accessibility: The park has wheelchair-accessible pathways for most areas. However, some rides or shows might have limitations
Weather: Phuket has a tropical climate with warm temperatures year-round. The rainy season is typically from May to October
What’s included: Show Only - Gold Seat
How to use: Show Mobile Ticket: Ticketing counter
How to use: Please present either mobile or printed voucher with your passport upon the counter for admission.

Terms & Conditions: Admission Ticket is valid only on the selected date. For same-date visits, please purchase tickets before 8:00 PM. The above rates are per person and inclusive of 7% VAT. The above rates are applicable for ALL MARKET. Tickets are non-refundable and non-exchangeable.Eligibility Child rate applies to guests with height between 101–140 cm (40–55 inches) inclusive, regardless of age. Infants aged 0–4 years or with height under 100 cm are free of charge (ticket only). Children with height below 100 cm may attend the show free of charge but must share a seat with their parents during transfer arrangements (if applicable).Attraction Access Access to the show is based on the selected ticket and valid visit date.Additional Information Please ensure all ticket conditions above are reviewed prior to purchase.Important Notes Guests must comply with all admission and eligibility requirements above before visiting.
Cancellation Policy: No cancellation for this activity as per vendor policy
What’s included: Show Only - Normal Seat
What’s included: Show - Normal Seat
What’s included: Buffet Dinner

What’s included: Round Trip Shared Transfer
How to use: Actual pick up time will be sent in separate email.

Terms & Conditions: Admission Ticket is valid only on the service date mentioned. Booking must be made at least 1 day in advance. The above rates are per person and inclusive of 7% VAT. The above rates are applicable for ALL MARKET. Tickets are non-refundable and non-exchangeable.Eligibility Child rate applies to guests with height between 101–140 cm (40–55 inches) inclusive, regardless of age. Infants aged 0–4 years or with height under 100 cm (39 inches) are free of charge (ticket only). Infants under 100 cm (39 inches) may enter free of charge but will not be provided with theater seats.Attraction Access Transportation service is non-private and operates according to the time and trip schedules specified by Phuket FantaSea only.Additional Information Infant may board the transfer free of charge; however, no seat will be provided. The transfer service is mandatory for infants and will be charged at THB 450 per person (round-trip). An infant car seat is mandatory and must be paid together with the transfer service directly at the onsite counter.Important Information for Share Transfer Please be ready at the main lobby at least 5 minutes before the scheduled pick-up time and present your Name and Reservation Code to our chauffeur before boarding. As shared transfers cannot wait more than 5 minutes, please be punctual. If you are unable to locate the driver, please contact the operator at (+66) 80 078 8256** At the pick-up time, the driver will display a signboard with “Phuket FantaSea / Carnival Magic.” Both attractions (Carnival Magic and Phuket FantaSea) share the same transfer service managed by Phuket FantaSea. The vans can be easily recognized by their pink and grey colors and the attraction logos displayed on the vehicles.Important Notes Please ensure all admission and eligibility requirements above are met prior to booking and visiting.
What’s included: Normal Seat
